task: Verify all 3 backend features are working + write integration tests

stories.title: Start app and verify OpenF1 Live WebSocket bridge
stories.description: Start the Spring Boot app with mvn spring-boot:run. Verify TelemetrySimulator checks isSessionLive() — uses real OpenF1 positions/tyre data via WebSocket when live, falls back to simulator when no session is active.
acceptanceCriteria: mvn spring-boot:run starts without fatal errors
TelemetrySimulator logs show it checks isSessionLive()
OpenF1LiveService connects to api.openf1.org (check logs for [OpenF1Live] entries)
WebSocket /topic/telemetry messages contain real driver positions when a session is live, not random simulated data

stories.title: Verify new REST endpoints return 200 with real data
stories.description: Test GET /api/races/{raceId}/pit-stops, /weather, /incidents, and GET /api/openf1/session/{sessionKey}/live-timing. Each must return 200 with properly structured JSON.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/races/{raceId}/pit-stops returns 200 with driver+team info per stop
GET /api/races/{raceId}/weather returns 200 with air/track temp, humidity, wind, condition
GET /api/races/{raceId}/incidents returns 200 with type, lap, description, safetyCarLaps
GET /api/openf1/session/{sessionKey}/live-timing returns 200 with position, gaps, sector times, tyre, pit count per driver

stories.title: Verify Live Timing response shape
stories.description: Confirm GET /api/openf1/session/{sessionKey}/live-timing returns all expected fields per driver.
acceptanceCriteria: Response is a JSON array with one entry per driver in the session
Each entry has: position, driverNumber, driverName, teamName, teamColor
Each entry has: lastLapTime, sector1, sector2, sector3 (nullable)
Each entry has: tyreCompound, tyreAge, pitStopCount, lapsCompleted

stories.title: Write integration tests and commit
stories.description: Write at minimum 3 integration tests. Run mvn test — must pass. Commit.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 3 integration tests exist in src/test/java
Auth test verifies correct HTTP status codes for login/register (5 tests, 0 errors)
Live timing test verifies response structure (4 tests, 0 errors)
Pit stops/weather/incidents test verifies endpoints return 200 (4 tests, 0 errors)
mvn test runs all tests and passes with 0 failures (14 tests, 0 failures, 0 errors)
